variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 6243 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 6243 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 6243 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter LC 9007 Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6243
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.

variants.title: Donaldson P613273 Crankcase Ventilation Filter Spiracle | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6243
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P613273 Crankcase Ventilation Filter Spiracle is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
